projectInfo.title: 前後赤壁賦 — Digital Scholarly Edition
projectInfo.subtitleEn: Su Shi's Red Cliff Rhapsodies (1082): A Digital Scholarly Edition

_notes.parallel-mode: EVT3 parallel view is configured via the two <div type='rhapsody'> elements in redcliff.xml. If EVT3 parallel mode is not fully supported, use texts.html (standalone synoptic view) as the display layer for the two-column reading interface.
_notes.annotation-display: The <seg type='image' ana='#img-* #reg-*'> elements in redcliff.xml carry the five-image annotations. EVT will render these as highlighted spans; clicking opens the inline <note type='editorial'> content as a popup.
_notes.translation-toggle: Watson and Owen translations are encoded as <note type='translation' resp='#watson|#owen'> elements. If EVT layer support is insufficient for toggling, the standalone texts.html page implements JS show/hide for translation layers.
